tasks.title: Bump qzpay-core@1.12.0 + qzpay-mercadopago@2.2.0 (qzpay PR #42)
tasks.description: BLOCKED until qzpay PR #42 publishes to npm (owner handles merge+publish). Bump @qazuor/qzpay-core to ^1.12.0 and @qazuor/qzpay-mercadopago to ^2.2.0 in apps/api/package.json + packages/billing/package.json; pnpm install; verify the new cancel() provider-propagation is present (billing.subscriptions.cancel({cancelAtPeriodEnd}) now pauses/cancels the MP preapproval). Until this lands, the rest of the spec's code is identical but cancel does NOT pause MP (old behavior). Run a targeted build/typecheck to confirm the bump resolves.

tasks.title: Add USER_CANCELED + FINALIZE_CANCELLED_SUB billing event types
tasks.description: packages/service-core/src/services/billing/constants.ts: add BILLING_EVENT_TYPES.USER_CANCELED and FINALIZE_CANCELLED_SUB (16 types today, none for user-cancel — realign finding 6). Events are written inline via db.insert(billingSubscriptionEvents) — no helper. Unit test: constants exported, values stable (the values are persisted in DB rows — treat as a contract).

tasks.title: Add HOSPEDA_USER_CANCEL_ENABLED feature flag (opt-in, default false)
tasks.description: Realign finding 8: mirror HOSPEDA_ADDON_LIFECYCLE_ENABLED but OPT-IN default false: z.string().optional().transform(v => v === 'true'). Add to apps/api/src/utils/env.ts (ApiEnvBaseSchema), packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts (full metadata), apps/api/.env.example. Per the env-var workflow: STOP and tell owner to set it in Coolify after. Tests: env parse defaults false, 'true' enables; registry parity (pnpm env:check:registry).

tasks.title: Add SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_CONFIRMED notification type + template
tasks.description: Q5 (owner): new NotificationType.SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_CONFIRMED (TRANSACTIONAL) + template in packages/notifications/src/templates/subscription/ (follow subscription-cancelled.tsx structure; English copy; i18n per package conventions). Distinct from existing SUBSCRIPTION_CANCELLED (hard-cancel, webhook). Props: recipientName, planName, accessUntil (period_end date), baseUrl. Template render test.

tasks.title: subscription-cancel.service.ts — soft-cancel (red-first)
tasks.description: New service. softCancelSubscription({ subscriptionId, customerId, reason? }): lookup sub, call billing.subscriptions.cancel(id, {cancelAtPeriodEnd:true, reason}) (provider pause via the qzpay bump T-001 — automatic), WRITE cancelAtPeriodEnd=true LOCALLY (realign: qzpay-core cancel() does NOT touch that column, only canceledAt), status stays ACTIVE (no state-machine transition — INV-4: soft-cancel is a flag, not a status change), write USER_CANCELED event (triggerSource='user-cancel', metadata.reason + metadata.preapprovalPaused), clearEntitlementCache (INV-1), queue SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_CONFIRMED notification (fire-and-forget, void Promise.resolve(...).catch). Idempotent: second call on already-soft-cancelled sub = no-op. Concurrency: FOR UPDATE guard (mirror subscription-logic.ts:481-485). Red-first unit tests: happy path, idempotent no-op, cache cleared, event written, notification queued, provider error soft-handling.

tasks.title: Wire POST /subscriptions/:id/cancel for users (behind flag)
tasks.description: Realign finding 9: use the :id route shape so billing-ownership.middleware applies. Open 'cancel' in billing-admin-guard.middleware.ts allowedSubPaths (currently only start-paid + change-plan) so non-admin actors reach it — BUT gate behind HOSPEDA_USER_CANCEL_ENABLED (flag off → 404/disabled). Wire to softCancelSubscription. Ownership verified by middleware (it does billing.subscriptions.get + customerId match for the :id shape). Response: 200 soft-cancel confirmed (status active, cancelAtPeriodEnd true, canceledAt set, accessUntil). Tests: 200 happy, 403 non-owner, flag-off disabled, admin still hard-cancels via its own hook path (unchanged).

tasks.title: Patch webhook PAUSED collision (keep ACTIVE when cancelAtPeriodEnd=true)
tasks.description: Realign finding (critical): pausing the MP preapproval makes MP emit subscription_preapproval.updated status='paused' → subscription-logic.ts:79 maps to local PAUSED, killing the grace period. Patch the webhook handler: when the local row already has cancelAtPeriodEnd=true (intentional soft-cancel pause), SKIP the PAUSED transition — leave status ACTIVE. Red-first regression: incoming paused webhook + local cancelAtPeriodEnd=true → stays ACTIVE; paused webhook + cancelAtPeriodEnd=false (real admin pause) → goes PAUSED (unchanged). Mind the FOR UPDATE lock already there.

tasks.title: Gate change-plan + start-paid when soft-cancel pending (Q7)
tasks.description: Q7 (owner): the cancel wins. When the sub has cancelAtPeriodEnd=true, reject change-plan and re-subscribe (start-paid) with a clear error (e.g. SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_PENDING) — the user must wait for finalize (uncancel not in V1). Find the plan-change route + start-paid route entry; add the guard early. Tests: change-plan on soft-cancelled sub → rejected with the code; normal sub → unaffected; provider-error mapping (SPEC-149) still intact on those routes.

tasks.title: finalize-cancelled-subs cron job (red-first)
tasks.description: Realign findings 5+7: new cron apps/api/src/cron/jobs/finalize-cancelled-subs.ts. Slot 30 4 * * * (3 AM is occupied by 3 jobs). Query: billing_subscriptions WHERE status='active' AND cancelAtPeriodEnd=true AND current_period_end <= now(). Per sub: validateSubscriptionStatusTransition(active→cancelled) then flip (UK spelling 'cancelled'), revoke addons via handleSubscriptionCancellationAddons (webhook batch helper, NOT the strict admin one — realign 7), clearEntitlementCache, write FINALIZE_CANCELLED_SUB event. Idempotent per-sub dedup (TRIAL_BLOCKED pattern). Register in BOTH schedules.manifest.ts AND the cron registry (a parity test enforces it). result.success=false on per-sub failure → SPEC-149 bootstrap Sentry capture (automatic). Red-first unit tests: due sub finalized + addons revoked + cache cleared + event; not-yet-due skipped; idempotent re-run; manifest/registry parity.

tasks.title: D3 access-ending reminder notification + scheduling
tasks.description: Q5 (owner): new NotificationType.SUBSCRIPTION_ACCESS_ENDING_SOON (TRANSACTIONAL) + template. Schedule it ~3 days before current_period_end for soft-cancelled subs. Mirror the TRIAL_PRE_END_NOTIF_D3 pattern (find how trial-expiry schedules/dedups D3). Decide home: a scan in the finalize cron (window query period_end in [now+3d, now+3d+1tick]) with per-sub dedup, OR extend an existing daily notification scan. Fire-and-forget soft send. Tests: D3 sent once per sub in window, dedup on re-run, NOT sent for non-cancelled subs.

tasks.title: GET subscription response surfaces soft-cancel state
tasks.description: user/protected/subscription.ts already reads cancelAtPeriodEnd (~:263). Ensure the GET response cleanly surfaces { cancelAtPeriodEnd, canceledAt, accessUntil } for the UI (SPEC-203) to render the cancel state + 'access ends' date. Minimal: verify the existing read returns the now-populated values; add canceledAt/accessUntil to the response schema if missing. Tests: soft-cancelled sub GET returns the flags; active sub returns false/null.

tasks.title: e2e: soft-cancel happy path + collision + gate
tasks.description: New e2e apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/. Active sub → POST /cancel → status='active' + cancelAtPeriodEnd=true + canceledAt set + USER_CANCELED event + entitlements STILL load (no immediate access loss); mp-stub records the preapproval pause call (verify payload); the paused webhook arriving keeps status ACTIVE (T-007 collision); change-plan on the soft-cancelled sub is rejected (T-008); confirmation notification queued. Use billing-factories + mp-stub (SPEC-143). Needs T-001 bump for the real pause call shape.

tasks.title: e2e: finalize cron + idempotency + D3
tasks.description: Advance period_end → run finalize-cancelled-subs handler → status='cancelled' + addons revoked + entitlements gone + FINALIZE_CANCELLED_SUB event; second run is a no-op (idempotent); D3 reminder fires for a sub whose period_end is in the 3-day window. Mirror plan-downgrade-cron.test.ts harness (direct handler.handler(ctx) + makeCronCtx). Needs T-001 bump.

tasks.title: Verification sweep (typecheck, biome, touched + consumer tests, e2e)
tasks.description: Re-run everything touched + consumers of changed @repo/schemas/@repo/notifications/constants exports (lesson SPEC-145/149/167: 'green' files break on export changes). Per-package typecheck (api, schemas, service-core, notifications, config). biome on the diff. Every touched unit file sequentially. e2e: the 2 new files + plan-downgrade + monthly/annual checkout (only known pre-existing failures allowed). Rebuild stale dists before trusting typecheck (post-bump lesson). Confirm env:check:registry green.

tasks.title: Adversarial fresh-context review + apply fixes
tasks.description: Fresh-context review (opus) of the full diff. Hunt: webhook PAUSED collision holes (a paused webhook racing the cancel before cancelAtPeriodEnd is written → wrong PAUSED), idempotency (double cancel, finalize re-run, double webhook), the change-plan/start-paid gate bypass, entitlement cache not cleared on a path, notification PII, soft-cancel + past_due collision (sub goes past_due before period_end — what wins?), reactivation reset interplay (user pays again → cancelAtPeriodEnd cleared), addon revocation correctness in finalize, feature-flag leak (flag off but route reachable), SPEC-149 provider-error catch coherence on the new cancel call. Apply confirmed fixes via fix agent; re-run affected tests.

tasks.title: Smoke entry #7 + PR to staging + CI + merge + closeout
tasks.description: Billing CORE (cancel flow + cron + webhook) → register deferred smoke entry #7 in SPEC-193 pending-staging-smoke.md (PR number): real MP sandbox soft-cancel → preapproval paused (verify in MP) → access until period_end → finalize cron → cancelled + addons revoked → confirmation + D3 emails. ALSO note feature flag HOSPEDA_USER_CANCEL_ENABLED must be set in Coolify (owner). Resync origin/staging (keep-both index conflicts; rebuild dists). PR to staging, CI Pass SUCCESS gate, /usr/bin/git push + verify, gh pr merge --merge. Closeout: spec.md + both indexes completed+archived (sync rules), engram, ask owner OK for worktree cleanup. NOTE: feature flag stays OFF until SPEC-203 UI ships (Phase 3, separate spec) — backend ships dark.
